list.name: Changes
list.comment:
Update README with Altzone branding and detailed resources
Revised the README to include Altzone branding, an introduction to the project, and links to key resources like the project wiki and contributor information. This improves clarity, highlights contributor efforts, and aligns the project with the broader Altzone initiative.

task.summary:
Add contribution guidelines, templates, and project metadata
This commit introduces community standards and documentation to improve collaboration on the Teachers-Pages project. Includes a Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct, a contributing guide, various issue and pull request templates, a CODEOWNERS file, and updates to `package.json` for project metadata. These updates aim to enhance project maintainability and contributor experience.

Update README with Altzone branding and detailed resources
Revised the README to include Altzone branding, an introduction to the project, and links to key resources like the project wiki and contributor information. This improves clarity, highlights contributor efforts, and aligns the project with the broader Altzone initiative.

MESSAGE.value:
Add CI workflow, contributor guidelines, and project templates
This commit introduces a GitHub Actions CI workflow for building, testing, and deployment. It also adds community files, including a Code of Conduct, contributing guide, CODEOWNERS, and standardized issue/PR templates, to streamline collaboration and improve project documentation.

Add contribution guidelines, templates, and project metadata
This commit introduces community standards and documentation to improve collaboration on the Teachers-Pages project. Includes a Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct, a contributing guide, various issue and pull request templates, a CODEOWNERS file, and updates to `package.json` for project metadata. These updates aim to enhance project maintainability and contributor experience.

Update README with Altzone branding and detailed resources
Revised the README to include Altzone branding, an introduction to the project, and links to key resources like the project wiki and contributor information. This improves clarity, highlights contributor efforts, and aligns the project with the broader Altzone initiative.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
Update README with Altzone branding and detailed resources
Revised the README to include Altzone branding, an introduction to the project, and links to key resources like the project wiki and contributor information. This improves clarity, highlights contributor efforts, and aligns the project with the broader Altzone initiative.
